nodes.label: Jesus finds expelled man → reveal Son of Man → worship → judgment saying

hinges.identity_□: Jesus is the Light of the world who reveals by giving sight and by self-disclosure to the cast out.
hinges.enactment_◇: Jesus sees, works (mud/anoint/send), then hears of expulsion and finds the man, questions and reveals himself.
hinges.effect_Δ: The blind man comes to confession and worship; opponents harden into culpable blindness.
